mapper.sql: select cc.*, coalesce(sm.system_mapping_count, 0) as system_mapping_count, coalesce(bs.buyer_scope_count, 0) as buyer_scope_count, coalesce(sm.system_channel_summary, '') as system_channel_summary, coalesce(qm.quote_master_warehouse_summary, '') as quote_master_warehouse_summary, coalesce(qm.quote_upstream_channel_summary, '') as quote_upstream_channel_summary, case when cc.buyer_scope_mode = 'ALL' then '全部买家' when cc.buyer_scope_mode = 'INCLUDE' then concat('可用名单：', coalesce(bs.buyer_scope_summary, '')) when cc.buyer_scope_mode = 'EXCLUDE' then concat('不可用名单：', coalesce(bs.buyer_scope_summary, '')) else '' end as buyer_scope_summary from logistics_customer_channel cc left join ( select customer_channel_code, count(1) as system_mapping_count, group_concat(system_channel_name_snapshot order by display_order asc, system_channel_name_snapshot separator '、') as system_channel_summary from logistics_customer_channel_system_mapping group by customer_channel_code ) sm on sm.customer_channel_code = cc.customer_channel_code left join ( select customer_channel_code, group_concat(master_warehouse_name_snapshot order by mapping_id desc separator '、') as quote_master_warehouse_summary, group_concat(concat(upstream_channel_code, ' / ', upstream_channel_name) order by mapping_id desc separator '、') as quote_upstream_channel_summary from logistics_customer_channel_quote_mapping where pairing_role = 'QUOTE' group by customer_channel_code ) qm on qm.customer_channel_code = cc.customer_channel_code left join ( select customer_channel_code, count(1) as buyer_scope_count, group_concat(buyer_name_snapshot order by buyer_name_snapshot separator '、') as buyer_scope_summary from logistics_customer_channel_buyer_scope group by customer_channel_code ) bs on bs.customer_channel_code = cc.customer_channel_code
mapper.update: update logistics_customer_channel set customer_channel_name = #{customerChannelName}, channel_type = #{channelType}, standard_carrier_code = #{standardCarrierCode}, signature_services = #{signatureServices}, label_upload_required = #{labelUploadRequired}, platform_label_fetch = #{platformLabelFetch}, customer_label_upload_supported = #{customerLabelUploadSupported}, status = #{status}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where customer_channel_code = #{customerChannelCode}
update logistics_customer_channel set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where customer_channel_code = #{customerChannelCode}
update logistics_customer_channel set buyer_scope_mode = #{buyerScopeMode}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where customer_channel_code = #{customerChannelCode}
mapper.select: select * from logistics_customer_channel_system_mapping where customer_channel_code = #{customerChannelCode} order by display_order asc, mapping_id desc
mapper.update: update logistics_customer_channel_system_mapping set system_channel_code = #{systemChannelCode}, system_channel_name_snapshot = #{systemChannelNameSnapshot}, standard_carrier_code_snapshot = #{standardCarrierCodeSnapshot}, signature_services_snapshot = #{signatureServicesSnapshot}, status = #{status}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where customer_channel_code = #{customerChannelCode} and mapping_id = #{mappingId}
mapper.select: select * from logistics_customer_channel_quote_mapping where customer_channel_code = #{customerChannelCode} order by mapping_id desc
select * from logistics_customer_channel_buyer_scope where customer_channel_code = #{customerChannelCode} order by buyer_name_snapshot asc, scope_id desc
